name: Classic Mud Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 6 ounces of semisweet chocolate chips and 3 tablespoons of butter over hot (not boiling) water until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth.
2. Add 1 1/4 cups of chocolate wafer crumbs, stirring until well blended. Press into a 9-inch pie pan. Chill until firm.
3. Combine remaining 6 ounces of semisweet chocolate chips, 3 tablespoons of butter, and 1/2 cup of heavy cream over hot (not boiling) water until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in 1 tablespoon of coffee flavored liqueur. Chill for 10 minutes.
5. Spread half of the sauce on the bottom of the chocolate cookie crust. Chill for 15 minutes.
6. In a large bowl, combine the ice cream and 2 tablespoons of coffee flavored liqueur. Pour over the Fudge Sauce layer in the pie pan.
7. Freeze several hours or until firm. Serve with remaining warm Fudge Sauce and whipped cream if used. Makes 1 9-inch pie
8. Yield: 8 servings.
